suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the established endpoint error-handling pattern for `_fetch_price`: wrap calls in try/except and route failures through `_handle_price_error()` so API responses consistently return `{"error": "..."}` envelopes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of feature `quote-endpoint` found `/quote` calls `_fetch_price` without try/except while `/price` uses `_handle_price_error()` for RetryError/ValueError handling (src/server.py).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit checklist item to verify `_fetch_price` exception wrapping and denominator safety checks (for ratio-based calculations) when implementing new pricing endpoints.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `quote-endpoint` passed expected behavior but review found two non-blocking production-risk gaps: unhandled `_fetch_price` exceptions and possible divide-by-zero on `to_price == 0.0`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Audit worker skill registration to ensure mission-assigned skills are always available in worker sessions when the skill files exist in `.factory/skills/`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of `existing-endpoints-regression` reported backend-worker skill unavailable to the worker despite `.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md` existing.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker initially navigated to the wrong repository before correcting path.
